title: Log out and block access to the protected profile
description: This test verifies that logging out revokes access so the same session can no longer open the protected profile page.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with valid credentials
Fill in the password field with valid credentials
Submit the login form
Log out of the account
Open the profile page
Verify an unauthenticated access message is visible
Verify the protected profile information is no longer displayed

title: User signs up and reaches protected profile data
description: Verifies a new user can register successfully and immediately access their profile through an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the full name field with a new volunteer name
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same valid password
Submit the registration form
Click the link to view the profile
Verify the authenticated profile is displayed

title: User logs out and loses access to profile data
description: Verifies logging out revokes the current session so the same authenticated token can no longer access the profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Click the link to view the profile
Verify the user is no longer authenticated
Verify access to the profile is blocked

title: Signed-in user views their profile after login
description: Verifies an existing user can log in and successfully view their profile as the first protected read after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the profile
Verify the user profile is displayed

title: Register a new volunteer account
description: This test verifies that a new volunteer can create an account and receive an authenticated session token for immediate access.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Fill in the full name field with a new volunteer name
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the registration form
Verify a successful account creation confirmation is visible
Verify authenticated user information is displayed

title: Block profile access when not signed in
description: An unauthenticated user cannot access protected profile information and sees an access denied state.

steps.description: Navigate to the profile page
Verify an unauthenticated access message is displayed
Verify profile details are not displayed

title: Register and access the protected profile read
description: This test verifies that a newly registered user can immediately access their profile after signup.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Fill in the full name field with a new volunteer name
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the registration form
Open the profile page
Verify the profile information is displayed
Verify authenticated access is available

title: Verify API health status
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated user can confirm the API is running and receive a successful health response.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/health
Verify a successful health response is visible
Verify a service status message is visible

title: Guest checks API health
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user can confirm the API is running before attempting protected actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/v1/health
Verify the API health status is available

title: Log in and view the current profile
description: This test verifies that an existing user can log in and see their profile details after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with valid credentials
Fill in the password field with valid credentials
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Verify the profile information is displayed
Verify authenticated user details are visible

title: Reset password and log in again
description: This test verifies that a user can complete password reset and then successfully log back in with the new password.

steps.description: Navigate to the password reset request page
Fill in the email field with a registered email address
Submit the password reset request
Open the password reset form
Fill in the reset token field with the provided token
Fill in the new password and confirmation fields with a valid password
Submit the password reset form
Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with the account username
Fill in the password field with the new password
Submit the login form
Verify a successful password reset confirmation is visible
Verify the user can access the signed-in session again

title: User resets password and logs in with the new password
description: Verifies a user can complete the reset flow with the returned token and then sign in using the new password.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with a registered email address
Submit the password reset request
Click the link to reset the password
Fill in the email field with the same registered email address
Fill in the reset token field with the returned token
Fill in the new password field with a valid new password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same new password
Submit the password reset form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with the account username
Fill in the password field with the new password
Submit the login form
Verify the user can sign in with the new password

title: View profile after signing in
description: An authenticated user can sign in and see their current profile details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link or button to view the profile
Verify the current profile details are displayed
Verify the user is shown as signed in

title: Update profile details successfully
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can update their profile name, username, and email and see the saved changes.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with valid credentials
Fill in the password field with valid credentials
Submit the login form
Open the profile edit page
Update the full name, username, and email fields with new valid values
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile details are displayed
Verify the saved profile information is visible

title: Signed-in user updates profile details
description: Verifies a logged-in user can update their profile information and see the saved changes reflected in the profile view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to edit the profile
Fill in the full name field with an updated display name
Fill in the username field with an updated unique username
Fill in the email field with an updated unique email address
Submit the profile update form
Verify the updated profile information is displayed

title: Guest requests a password reset token
description: Verifies a registered user can start password recovery by submitting an email and receiving a reset token in the response.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with a registered email address
Submit the password reset request
Verify a password reset confirmation is displayed
Verify a reset token is shown

title: Request a password reset
description: This test verifies that a user can start the password recovery flow using their email address and receive reset confirmation details.

steps.description: Navigate to the password reset request page
Fill in the email field with a registered email address
Submit the password reset request
Verify a reset confirmation is visible
Verify reset details are displayed

title: Signed-in user uploads a profile photo
description: Verifies a logged-in user can attach a valid profile photo and see the updated profile resource after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to edit the profile
Choose a valid profile photo file
Submit the profile update form
Verify the profile photo is displayed

title: Upload a profile photo successfully
description: A signed-in user can upload a valid profile photo and see the updated profile image information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link or button to upload a profile photo
Select a valid image file for the photo upload
Submit the photo upload
Verify the profile photo is shown as updated
Verify the profile now includes photo data

title: Reject duplicate account details during registration
description: This test verifies that registering with an existing username or email is blocked with a validation message.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Fill in the full name field with a new volunteer name
Fill in the username field with an existing username
Fill in the email field with an existing email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the registration form
Verify a duplicate account validation error is visible
Verify the account is not created

title: Show registration validation errors
description: This test verifies that the registration form displays field-level validation errors when required information is missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Submit the registration form without entering required details
Verify field-level validation errors are visible
Verify the account is not created

title: Show validation errors when profile changes are invalid
description: A signed-in user sees validation feedback when submitting incomplete or duplicate profile changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link or button to open profile editing
Clear one required profile field
Submit the profile changes
Verify profile validation errors are displayed
Verify the profile is not updated

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This test verifies that the login form shows an error when a user submits incorrect credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with an unknown username
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify no authenticated session is shown

title: Reject an invalid profile photo upload
description: A signed-in user sees validation feedback when attempting to upload a missing or invalid photo file.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link or button to upload a profile photo
Submit the photo upload without selecting a file
Verify a photo validation error is displayed
Verify no profile photo is added

title: Guest sees validation feedback for an invalid reset request
description: Verifies the forgot-password form shows validation feedback when a user submits an invalid email value.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with an invalid email value
Submit the password reset request
Verify an email validation error is visible
